headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Alexandria Real Estate, Lowers Price Target to $57
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Anthony Paolone   maintains Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $63 to $57.
